en: Can you fix this pronunciation I saw a sheep on the river Thames Was
ko: 이 발음을 고칠 수 있어? I saw a sheep on the river Thames. 그게

en: Listen again I saw a sheep on the river Thames
ko: 다시 들어봐. I saw a sheep on the river Thames

en: A sheep on the river Thames I think they meant ship
ko: 템즈강에서 sheep이라고? ship을 말하려고 한 것 같아

en: Sheep has a slightly longer vowel sound ee
ko: Sheep은 모음이 좀 더 길어. ee

en: sheep It might help to smile when making the sound
ko: sheep. 이 소리를 낼 때 웃는 것처럼 하면 도움이 돼

en: ee You can hear ee in me seat or cheese
ko: ee. me, seat, cheese에서 ee를 들을 수 있어

en: Ship has a shorter vowel sound ih
ship My lips are more relaxed when making the sound ih You can
ko: ship. 이 소리를 낼 때 입술이 더 편안해. ih. it, bin에서

en: or fist So let's fix that pronunciation I saw a sheep
ko: 또는 fist. 그럼 발음을 고쳐보자. I saw a ship

en: on the river Thames I saw a sheep on the river Thames
ko: on the river Thames. I saw a ship on the river Thames

en: What other words have ih and ee in them Write a comment
ko: ih와 ee가 들어간 다른 단어는 뭐가 있을까? 댓글을 써봐
